'''Egoreg''' was the leader of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine's]] [[super-vaporator]] project.

==Biography==
Egoreg was in charge of a venture to aid [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] as it suffered an unusually severe moisture drought. His project included the construction of a "[[super-vaporator]]," which can only be assumed to be a more powerful model of Tatooine's common [[Moisture vaporator/Legends|moisture vaporators]] used to pull water from the dry desert air.

Egoreg's assignment was plagued by mysterious mechanical failures, contaminated oil supplies and malfunctioning [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. While attending a meeting on his plans with several key players of the project, the conference room they were in suffered a minor explosion. No one was hurt, but just to be safe Egoreg ordered the project to stop. [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] went down to Maintenance for repairs, where he and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] discovered that the project's oil supply had been tampered with. The two went immediately to tell Egoreg, but were surprised en route by a group of [[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]]. Rushing to their aid, [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] ran into the Jawas as well, who were caught red-handed by C-3PO and R2-D2 sabotaging the machines and spoiling the oil supply, which had been the cause of the malfunctioning droid problem.

The Jawas were punished, and Chewbacca was awarded a medal for capturing them.<ref name="Rebellious Robot" />

==Behind the scenes==
Egoreg appeared in ''[[The Mystery of the Rebellious Robot]]'',<ref name="Rebellious Robot" /> a [[1979]] children's book written by [[Eleanor Ehrhardt]], who is uncredited,<ref name="6 Vintage Books">{{SW|url=news/6-vintage-star-wars-picture-books|text=6 Vintage ''Star Wars'' Picture Books}}</ref> and illustrated by [[Mark Corcoran]].<ref name="Rebellious Robot" /> Egoreg's name is a slight respelling of George backwards – a nod to the creator of ''[[Star Wars]]''. It is unknown if Captain Egoreg is somehow related to [[Egroeg Sacul]], a character mentioned in the ride [[Star Tours (real-world)|''Star Tours'']].

The two men pictured above are never positively identified. One is Captain Egoreg, while the other is an unnamed scientist at the conference.<ref name="Rebellious Robot" />

==Appearances==
